entity_types.name: Camera
entity_types.description: The record of CCTV IP Camera.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name assigned to the IP camera device.

properties.name: place_id
properties.description: The unique identifier of the place where the CCTV IP camera is installed.

properties.name: is_dvr
properties.description: Indicates whether the camera is associated with a digital video recorder.

properties.name: scheduler_group
properties.description: The group name assigned to the camera's scheduling configuration.

properties.name: state
properties.description: Indicates whether the camera is currently operational or non-operational. The value only: 'active' or 'inactive'

properties.name: capacitygroup_token
properties.description: The unique keyword identifier for the capacity group to which the camera belongs.

properties.name: created_at
properties.description: The timestamp when the CCTV IP camera record was created in the system.

properties.name: updated_at
properties.description: The date and time when the camera record was last updated.

properties.name: video_streaming_storage_depth
properties.description: The number of days video streaming data is retained in storage.

properties.name: ptz
properties.description: Indicates whether the camera supports pan-tilt-zoom functionality.

entity_types.name: Place
entity_types.description: Camera installation location.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the camera installation location.

properties.name: description
properties.description: The physical address where the camera is installed.

properties.name: latitude
properties.description: The geographic coordinate indicating the north-south position of the camera installation location on Earth.

properties.name: longitude
properties.description: The geographic longitude coordinate of the camera installation location.

properties.name: created_at
properties.description: The date and time the camera installation location was created.

properties.name: category_name
properties.description: The name of the category to which the place belongs, such as a specific store or location identifier.

properties.name: kind_name
properties.description: The specific type or name of the place, such as mosque, school, or hospital.

entity_types.name: Event
entity_types.description: Cameras events.

properties.name: event_id
properties.description: The unique identifier for a camera event record.

properties.name: event_type
properties.description: Specifies the category or classification of the camera event.

properties.name: ts
properties.description: The timestamp of the event in milliseconds since epoch.

properties.name: obsolete
properties.description: Indicates whether the camera event is no longer current or valid.

properties.name: snapshot_url
properties.description: A URL pointing to a snapshot image captured during the event.

properties.name: event_age
properties.description: The age of the event in years.

properties.name: event_beard
properties.description: Whether the event involves a beard.

properties.name: event_gender
properties.description: The gender of the person involved in the camera event.

properties.name: event_glasses
properties.description: Number of glasses worn during the event.

properties.name: event_mask
properties.description: A bitmask indicating the types of camera events being monitored or triggered.

entity_types.name: Client
entity_types.description: A person booking beauty or wellness services.

entity_types.name: Specialist
entity_types.description: A practitioner (stylist, therapist, trainer) providing services.

entity_types.name: Appointment
entity_types.description: A booked time slot for a service between client and specialist.

entity_types.name: Service
entity_types.description: A specific treatment or session offered (haircut, massage, class).

entity_types.name: Membership
entity_types.description: A recurring subscription giving a client access to services.

entity_types.name: Visit
entity_types.description: A record of a client attending a scheduled appointment.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: A retail item sold alongside services (cosmetic, supplement).

entity_types.name: Location
entity_types.description: A salon, studio, or wellness centre where services are delivered.

relation_types.name: BOOKED_BY
relation_types.description: Appointment was booked by the target client.

relation_types.name: DELIVERED_BY
relation_types.description: Service or appointment was delivered by the target specialist.

relation_types.name: HELD_AT
relation_types.description: Appointment or visit took place at the target location.

relation_types.name: INCLUDES
relation_types.description: Appointment includes the target service.

relation_types.name: HOLDS
relation_types.description: Client holds the target membership.

relation_types.name: RECORDS
relation_types.description: Visit records attendance of the target appointment.

relation_types.name: PURCHASED
relation_types.description: Client purchased the target product or membership.

relation_types.name: EMPLOYS
relation_types.description: Location employs or hosts the target specialist.

entity_types.name: Project
entity_types.description: A construction or renovation initiative with scope, budget, and timeline.

entity_types.name: Site
entity_types.description: The physical location where construction work takes place.

entity_types.name: Contractor
entity_types.description: A company or individual carrying out construction works.

entity_types.name: Subcontractor
entity_types.description: A specialist trade firm hired by the main contractor.

entity_types.name: Estimate
entity_types.description: A cost projection for a project or work package.

entity_types.name: WorkOrder
entity_types.description: An instruction to execute a defined scope of work on site.

entity_types.name: Material
entity_types.description: A construction material or supply item used on site.

entity_types.name: Inspection
entity_types.description: A formal quality or compliance check of completed work.

entity_types.name: Certificate
entity_types.description: A document certifying completion, quality, or compliance.

entity_types.name: DrawingRevision
entity_types.description: A versioned engineering or architectural drawing for the project.

relation_types.name: EXECUTED_AT
relation_types.description: Project or work order is executed at the target site.

relation_types.name: CONTRACTED_TO
relation_types.description: Work is contracted to the target contractor or subcontractor.

relation_types.name: USES
relation_types.description: Project or work order uses the target material.

relation_types.name: COVERS
relation_types.description: Estimate covers the target work order or project scope.

relation_types.name: INSPECTED_IN
relation_types.description: Work was assessed in the target inspection.

relation_types.name: CERTIFIED_BY
relation_types.description: Work or phase is certified by the target certificate.

relation_types.name: REFERENCES
relation_types.description: Work order references the target drawing revision.

relation_types.name: SUBCONTRACTS
relation_types.description: Contractor subcontracts the target work to a subcontractor.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: A natural person identified by name, role, or contact details.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: A company, firm, partnership, or other legal entity.

entity_types.name: Contact
entity_types.description: A set of communication details (email, phone, address) linked to a person or organization.

entity_types.name: Document
entity_types.description: Any formal written record: contract, report, letter, form, or policy.

entity_types.name: Location
entity_types.description: A physical or administrative place: address, city, region, country.

entity_types.name: MonetaryAmount
entity_types.description: A specific sum of money with optional currency and date context.

entity_types.name: Date
entity_types.description: A specific date, deadline, or time period explicitly mentioned.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: A good or service offered or referenced in a business context.

entity_types.name: Category
entity_types.description: A classification label grouping related entities or items.

entity_types.name: Event
entity_types.description: A significant occurrence with a date, participants, and outcome.

entity_types.name: Note
entity_types.description: A free-text observation or comment attached to another entity.

entity_types.name: Tag
entity_types.description: A short label used for search, filtering, or grouping.

relation_types.name: WORKS_FOR
relation_types.description: Person is employed by or associated with the organization.

relation_types.name: BELONGS_TO
relation_types.description: Subject is classified under or owned by the target.

relation_types.name: LOCATED_AT
relation_types.description: Subject has its physical or registered location at the target.

relation_types.name: HAS_CONTACT
relation_types.description: Subject person or organization has the target contact details.

relation_types.name: ISSUED_ON
relation_types.description: Document or event was created or occurred on the target date.

relation_types.name: INVOLVES
relation_types.description: Event or document involves the target person or organization.

relation_types.name: RELATED_TO
relation_types.description: Generic association between two entities.

relation_types.name: TAGGED_WITH
relation_types.description: Subject is labeled with the target tag or category.

relation_types.name: PART_OF
relation_types.description: Subject is a component or subdivision of the target.

entity_types.name: Ticket
entity_types.description: A recorded customer request, issue, or complaint.

entity_types.name: Customer
entity_types.description: A person or company that has submitted a support request.

entity_types.name: Agent
entity_types.description: A support team member who handles tickets.

entity_types.name: Queue
entity_types.description: A group or bucket to which tickets are routed.

entity_types.name: SLA
entity_types.description: A service-level agreement defining response and resolution time targets.

entity_types.name: Channel
entity_types.description: The communication channel used: email, chat, phone, portal.

entity_types.name: Category
entity_types.description: A topic classification assigned to a ticket.

entity_types.name: Resolution
entity_types.description: The solution or answer provided to close a ticket.

entity_types.name: Escalation
entity_types.description: A transfer of a ticket to a higher-tier team or manager.

entity_types.name: KnowledgeArticle
entity_types.description: A self-service document used to resolve common issues.

relation_types.name: SUBMITTED_BY
relation_types.description: Ticket was submitted by the target customer.

relation_types.name: ASSIGNED_TO
relation_types.description: Ticket is assigned to the target agent or queue.

relation_types.name: GOVERNED_BY
relation_types.description: Ticket is subject to the target SLA.

relation_types.name: RECEIVED_VIA
relation_types.description: Ticket arrived through the target channel.

relation_types.name: CLASSIFIED_AS
relation_types.description: Ticket is classified under the target category.

relation_types.name: RESOLVED_WITH
relation_types.description: Ticket was closed using the target resolution or knowledge article.

relation_types.name: ESCALATED_TO
relation_types.description: Ticket was escalated to the target agent, queue, or escalation record.

relation_types.name: RELATED_TO
relation_types.description: Ticket is related to another ticket or issue.

entity_types.name: OnlineOrder
entity_types.description: A customer order placed via a digital channel.

entity_types.name: Customer
entity_types.description: A registered user who places orders on the platform.

entity_types.name: Cart
entity_types.description: A temporary collection of items a customer intends to purchase.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: A digital catalogue item with price, images, and attributes.

entity_types.name: Shipment
entity_types.description: A physical dispatch of ordered goods, with tracking and status.

entity_types.name: Return
entity_types.description: A customer-initiated request to send back an ordered item.

entity_types.name: SalesChannel
entity_types.description: A marketplace or platform through which orders are received.

entity_types.name: Coupon
entity_types.description: A discount code or voucher applied at checkout.

entity_types.name: Review
entity_types.description: A customer-written rating and comment on a product.

entity_types.name: Warehouse
entity_types.description: A fulfilment location that stores and dispatches products.

relation_types.name: PLACED_BY
relation_types.description: Order was placed by the target customer.

relation_types.name: CONTAINS
relation_types.description: Cart or order contains the target product.

relation_types.name: FULFILLED_VIA
relation_types.description: Order is fulfilled via the target warehouse or channel.

relation_types.name: SHIPPED_AS
relation_types.description: Order is dispatched as the target shipment.

relation_types.name: RECEIVED_THROUGH
relation_types.description: Order was received through the target sales channel.

relation_types.name: DISCOUNTED_BY
relation_types.description: Order or item is discounted by the target coupon.

relation_types.name: REVIEWED_AS
relation_types.description: Product received the target review.

relation_types.name: RETURNED_IN
relation_types.description: Shipment item is subject to the target return.

entity_types.name: Student
entity_types.description: A person enrolled in a course or training programme.

entity_types.name: Instructor
entity_types.description: A teacher, trainer, or facilitator delivering course content.

entity_types.name: Course
entity_types.description: A structured learning programme with topics, materials, and assessments.

entity_types.name: Session
entity_types.description: A single class or workshop meeting within a course.

entity_types.name: Group
entity_types.description: A cohort of students learning together in a course.

entity_types.name: Enrollment
entity_types.description: A record of a student joining a course or group.

entity_types.name: Assessment
entity_types.description: An exam, quiz, or assignment used to evaluate student progress.

entity_types.name: Certificate
entity_types.description: A credential issued to a student upon course completion.

entity_types.name: Material
entity_types.description: A learning resource: slide deck, video, worksheet, or reading.

relation_types.name: ENROLLED_IN
relation_types.description: Student is enrolled in the target course or group.

relation_types.name: TAUGHT_BY
relation_types.description: Course or session is taught by the target instructor.

relation_types.name: BELONGS_TO
relation_types.description: Session or assessment belongs to the target course.

relation_types.name: ATTENDS
relation_types.description: Student attends the target session.

relation_types.name: COMPLETES
relation_types.description: Student completes the target course or assessment.

relation_types.name: AWARDED_TO
relation_types.description: Certificate is awarded to the target student.

relation_types.name: USES
relation_types.description: Course or session uses the target material.

relation_types.name: GROUPED_IN
relation_types.description: Student is grouped in the target cohort or group.

entity_types.name: ServiceOrder
entity_types.description: A work order for an on-site visit or repair job.

entity_types.name: Customer
entity_types.description: A person or organisation requesting field service.

entity_types.name: Technician
entity_types.description: A field worker dispatched to carry out service orders.

entity_types.name: Appointment
entity_types.description: A scheduled visit agreed with the customer.

entity_types.name: SparePart
entity_types.description: A component or material used during a service visit.

entity_types.name: ServiceReport
entity_types.description: A record of work done, parts used, and outcome after a visit.

entity_types.name: Asset
entity_types.description: A piece of equipment or installation being serviced.

entity_types.name: Zone
entity_types.description: A geographic area or territory assigned to a technician or team.

entity_types.name: Signature
entity_types.description: Customer sign-off confirming completion of a service order.

relation_types.name: REQUESTED_BY
relation_types.description: Service order was requested by the target customer.

relation_types.name: ASSIGNED_TO
relation_types.description: Service order or appointment is assigned to the target technician.

relation_types.name: SCHEDULED_AS
relation_types.description: Service order is scheduled as the target appointment.

relation_types.name: COVERS
relation_types.description: Zone covers the target customer address or asset location.

relation_types.name: USES
relation_types.description: Service order or report uses the target spare part.

relation_types.name: TARGETS
relation_types.description: Service order targets the target asset for repair or maintenance.

relation_types.name: DOCUMENTED_IN
relation_types.description: Work done is documented in the target service report.

relation_types.name: CONFIRMED_BY
relation_types.description: Service order completion is confirmed by the target signature.

entity_types.name: Invoice
entity_types.description: A document requesting payment for goods or services delivered.

entity_types.name: Payment
entity_types.description: A record of money transferred to settle an obligation.

entity_types.name: Expense
entity_types.description: A cost incurred by the business, with category and amount.

entity_types.name: Budget
entity_types.description: A planned allocation of funds for a period or cost centre.

entity_types.name: Account
entity_types.description: A chart-of-accounts entry tracking a category of transactions.

entity_types.name: Transaction
entity_types.description: A single financial entry: debit or credit with date and amount.

entity_types.name: Counterparty
entity_types.description: A supplier, customer, or partner involved in financial transactions.

entity_types.name: TaxRecord
entity_types.description: A record of tax liability, payment, or filing for a period.

entity_types.name: CostCentre
entity_types.description: An organisational unit to which costs are allocated.

entity_types.name: FinancialReport
entity_types.description: A periodic statement: balance sheet, P&L, cash-flow report.

relation_types.name: ISSUED_TO
relation_types.description: Invoice is addressed to the target counterparty.

relation_types.name: SETTLES
relation_types.description: Payment settles the target invoice or obligation.

relation_types.name: CHARGED_TO
relation_types.description: Expense or transaction is charged to the target account or cost centre.

relation_types.name: ALLOCATED_TO
relation_types.description: Budget amount is allocated to the target cost centre or project.

relation_types.name: INVOLVES
relation_types.description: Transaction involves the target counterparty.

relation_types.name: BELONGS_TO
relation_types.description: Transaction or expense belongs to the target account.

relation_types.name: COVERED_BY
relation_types.description: Expense is covered by the target budget.

relation_types.name: REPORTED_IN
relation_types.description: Transaction or account balance is reported in the target financial report.

flippa.description: Flippa is an online marketplace that connects buyers and sellers of websites, domain names, apps, and online businesses.

entity_types.name: Listing
entity_types.description: A Flippa marketplace listing for a digital asset offered for sale.

properties.name: listing_url
properties.description: Public URL of the Flippa listing.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Listing title, useful for semantic search and claim extraction.

properties.name: original_price
properties.description: Original price before price drop, if available.

properties.name: price_dropped
properties.description: Whether the listing price has dropped.

properties.name: bid_count
properties.description: Number of bids on the listing.

properties.name: sale_method
properties.description: Sale method, for example auction or fixed price.

properties.name: open_listing
properties.description: Whether the listing is currently open.

properties.name: under_offer
properties.description: Whether the listing is under offer.

properties.name: profit_average
properties.description: Average monthly net profit in USD.

properties.name: target_raise_amount
properties.description: Target raise amount for investment-style listings.

properties.name: app_rating
properties.description: App rating for mobile app listings.

properties.name: established_at
properties.description: Asset age in years as numeric value.

properties.name: age_label
properties.description: Type of age label, such as Site Age or App Age.

properties.name: display_verification_badge
properties.description: Whether Flippa displays a verification badge.

properties.name: manually_vetted
properties.description: Whether the listing was manually vetted.

properties.name: super_seller
properties.description: Whether seller is marked as super seller.

properties.name: managed_by_flippa
properties.description: Whether listing is managed by Flippa.

properties.name: editors_choice
properties.description: Whether listing is marked as editor's choice.

properties.name: early_access_listing
properties.description: Whether the listing had early access mode.

properties.name: watched
properties.description: Whether current viewer watches the listing.

properties.name: partial_sale
properties.description: Whether listing is a partial sale.

entity_types.name: AssetType
entity_types.description: Type of digital asset, such as SaaS, Ecommerce, Content, Android App, Marketplace, YouTube Channel or Amazon Store.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key. Normalized asset type name.

entity_types.name: Category
entity_types.description: Flippa industry or category assigned to the listing.

entity_types.name: Monetization
entity_types.description: Revenue model used by the asset.

entity_types.name: Country
entity_types.description: Country or seller/listing location as presented by Flippa.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key. Normalized country or location name.

entity_types.name: Integration
entity_types.description: External platform or data provider connected to a listing, such as Stripe, Google Analytics, Google AdSense or Amazon Seller.

properties.name: tooltip_text
properties.description: Tooltip text shown for the integration.

entity_types.name: Verification
entity_types.description: Verification signal attached to a listing.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key. Verification provider or type.

properties.name: provider
properties.description: Verification provider, such as verified-listing, stripe or google_analytics.

entity_types.name: Badge
entity_types.description: Visual badge or label attached to a listing.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key. Normalized badge text and variant.

entity_types.name: KeyData
entity_types.description: Label-value fact displayed in Flippa's key data block.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key. Listing ID plus normalized label.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Displayed key data label, such as Type, Industry, Monetization, Site Age or Net Profit.

entity_types.name: RiskFlag
entity_types.description: Derived analytical risk flag used for due diligence and ranking.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key. Normalized risk flag name.

entity_types.name: OpportunitySignal
entity_types.description: Derived positive investment signal used for deal sourcing.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Primary key. Normalized opportunity signal name.

relation_types.name: HAS_ASSET_TYPE
relation_types.description: Direction Listing -> AssetType. Connects a Flippa listing to its digital asset type.

relation_types.name: IN_CATEGORY
relation_types.description: Direction Listing -> Category. Connects a listing to its Flippa industry or category.

relation_types.name: USES_MONETIZATION
relation_types.description: Direction Listing -> Monetization. Connects a listing to its revenue model.

relation_types.name: LOCATED_IN
relation_types.description: Direction Listing -> Country. Connects a listing to the country or location shown by Flippa.

relation_types.name: HAS_INTEGRATION
relation_types.description: Direction Listing -> Integration. Connects a listing to connected external data providers or commerce platforms.

relation_types.name: HAS_VERIFICATION
relation_types.description: Direction Listing -> Verification. Connects a listing to verification signals such as verified-listing, google_analytics, stripe or shopify.

relation_types.name: HAS_BADGE
relation_types.description: Direction Listing -> Badge. Connects a listing to visual marketplace badges such as Sponsored, Broker, Super Seller, Managed by Flippa or Editor's Choice.

relation_types.name: HAS_KEY_DATA
relation_types.description: Direction Listing -> KeyData. Connects a listing to displayed label-value facts from the Flippa key data block.

relation_types.name: HAS_RISK_FLAG
relation_types.description: Direction Listing -> RiskFlag. Connects a listing to derived due-diligence risk flags.

relation_types.name: HAS_OPPORTUNITY_SIGNAL
relation_types.description: Direction Listing -> OpportunitySignal. Connects a listing to derived positive sourcing signals.

entity_types.name: Patient
entity_types.description: A person receiving medical care or consultation.

entity_types.name: Doctor
entity_types.description: A licensed medical professional who provides consultations and prescriptions.

entity_types.name: Visit
entity_types.description: A scheduled or walk-in appointment between a patient and a doctor.

entity_types.name: Prescription
entity_types.description: A medical instruction to dispense medication or treatment.

entity_types.name: Diagnosis
entity_types.description: A clinical finding or condition identified during a visit.

entity_types.name: Service
entity_types.description: A medical procedure, test, or treatment provided to a patient.

entity_types.name: Consent
entity_types.description: A patient's informed agreement to a procedure or data processing.

entity_types.name: Invoice
entity_types.description: A billing document for medical services rendered.

entity_types.name: MedicalRecord
entity_types.description: A cumulative health history record for a patient.

relation_types.name: TREATED_BY
relation_types.description: Patient was treated by the target doctor.

relation_types.name: ATTENDED
relation_types.description: Patient attended the target visit.

relation_types.name: RESULTED_IN
relation_types.description: Visit resulted in the target diagnosis or prescription.

relation_types.name: COVERS
relation_types.description: Medical record covers the target patient's history.

relation_types.name: PROVIDED_AT
relation_types.description: Service was provided during the target visit.

relation_types.name: BILLED_IN
relation_types.description: Service is billed in the target invoice.

relation_types.name: AUTHORISED_BY
relation_types.description: Prescription or procedure is authorised by the target consent.

relation_types.name: REFERS_TO
relation_types.description: Doctor or visit refers to another doctor or specialist.

entity_types.name: Venue
entity_types.description: A restaurant, café, bar, or hotel property.

entity_types.name: Guest
entity_types.description: A customer who visits, dines, or stays at the venue.

entity_types.name: Reservation
entity_types.description: An advance booking for a table, room, or event space.

entity_types.name: Table
entity_types.description: A seating unit in a restaurant or bar with capacity and status.

entity_types.name: Room
entity_types.description: A hotel or accommodation unit with type, rate, and availability.

entity_types.name: MenuItem
entity_types.description: A food or drink item on the menu with price and description.

entity_types.name: Order
entity_types.description: A guest's food and drink order placed during a visit.

entity_types.name: Shift
entity_types.description: A scheduled work period for staff at the venue.

entity_types.name: Supplier
entity_types.description: A vendor providing food, beverage, or supplies to the venue.

entity_types.name: Invoice
entity_types.description: A billing document for supplies delivered to the venue.

relation_types.name: MADE_BY
relation_types.description: Reservation or order was made by the target guest.

relation_types.name: HELD_AT
relation_types.description: Reservation or event is held at the target venue.

relation_types.name: ASSIGNED_TO
relation_types.description: Reservation is assigned to the target table or room.

relation_types.name: INCLUDES
relation_types.description: Order includes the target menu item.

relation_types.name: WORKED_BY
relation_types.description: Shift is worked by the target staff member.

relation_types.name: SUPPLIED_BY
relation_types.description: Menu item or supply is provided by the target supplier.

relation_types.name: BILLED_IN
relation_types.description: Order or stay is billed in the target invoice.

relation_types.name: FOLLOWS
relation_types.description: Reservation or order follows a prior visit or stay by the guest.

entity_types.name: Employee
entity_types.description: A person currently employed by the organisation.

entity_types.name: Candidate
entity_types.description: A person being considered for an open position.

entity_types.name: JobPosting
entity_types.description: An advertised vacancy with requirements, title, and location.

entity_types.name: Application
entity_types.description: A submission by a candidate for a specific job posting.

entity_types.name: Interview
entity_types.description: A scheduled evaluation session between a candidate and interviewers.

entity_types.name: Department
entity_types.description: An organisational unit grouping employees by function.

entity_types.name: Role
entity_types.description: A job title or position with defined responsibilities.

entity_types.name: LeaveRequest
entity_types.description: A formal request by an employee for absence or time off.

entity_types.name: PerformanceReview
entity_types.description: A periodic assessment of an employee's work and goals.

entity_types.name: Onboarding
entity_types.description: The process and checklist for integrating a new hire.

relation_types.name: WORKS_IN
relation_types.description: Employee works in the target department.

relation_types.name: HOLDS
relation_types.description: Employee holds the target role.

relation_types.name: APPLIED_FOR
relation_types.description: Candidate applied for the target job posting.

relation_types.name: RESULTED_IN
relation_types.description: Application resulted in the target interview or offer.

relation_types.name: CONDUCTED_BY
relation_types.description: Interview was conducted by the target employee or panel.

relation_types.name: REPORTS_TO
relation_types.description: Employee reports to the target manager.

relation_types.name: SUBMITTED_BY
relation_types.description: Leave request or review was submitted by the target employee.

relation_types.name: ASSIGNED_TO
relation_types.description: Onboarding task or review is assigned to the target employee.

entity_types.name: LegalNorm
entity_types.description: A rule, provision, article, or paragraph stated in the text.

entity_types.name: LegalAct
entity_types.description: A named statute, code, law, decree, or treaty.

entity_types.name: StateBody
entity_types.description: Any organ of public authority: court, ministry, agency, parliament.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: A natural person identified by role or name (judge, plaintiff, citizen).

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: A legal entity, association, or corporation other than a state body.

entity_types.name: LegalRight
entity_types.description: An entitlement or freedom granted to a subject.

entity_types.name: LegalObligation
entity_types.description: A duty, requirement, or prohibition imposed on a subject.

entity_types.name: Sanction
entity_types.description: A penalty, fine, or other consequence for a violation.

entity_types.name: LegalProcedure
entity_types.description: A formally described process (filing, appeal, hearing, registration).

entity_types.name: LegalConcept
entity_types.description: A defined legal term or category (property, citizenship, contract).

entity_types.name: Date
entity_types.description: A specific date or time period explicitly mentioned.

entity_types.name: Location
entity_types.description: A jurisdiction, territory, or named place.

entity_types.name: MonetaryAmount
entity_types.description: A specific sum of money referenced in the text.

relation_types.name: GRANTS
relation_types.description: Subject confers a right or power on another.

relation_types.name: REQUIRES
relation_types.description: Subject imposes a requirement on another.

relation_types.name: PROHIBITS
relation_types.description: Subject forbids the target action or state.

relation_types.name: REGULATES
relation_types.description: Subject sets rules over the target.

relation_types.name: ESTABLISHES
relation_types.description: Subject creates, founds, or institutes the target.

relation_types.name: ENFORCES
relation_types.description: Subject implements or compels compliance with the target.

relation_types.name: REFERENCES
relation_types.description: Subject cites or invokes the target.

relation_types.name: AMENDS
relation_types.description: Subject modifies the target legal act/norm.

relation_types.name: REPEALS
relation_types.description: Subject revokes the target legal act/norm.

relation_types.name: APPLIES_TO
relation_types.description: Subject's scope covers the target.

relation_types.name: PART_OF
relation_types.description: Subject is structurally contained in the target.

relation_types.name: HAS_SANCTION
relation_types.description: Subject (norm) attaches the target sanction.

relation_types.name: ISSUED_BY
relation_types.description: Subject (act/decision) was issued by the target body.

relation_types.name: DEFINED_AS
relation_types.description: Subject term is defined as the target concept.

entity_types.name: Shipment
entity_types.description: A consignment of goods dispatched from origin to destination.

entity_types.name: Parcel
entity_types.description: An individual package within a shipment.

entity_types.name: Route
entity_types.description: A planned sequence of stops for a vehicle on a delivery run.

entity_types.name: Driver
entity_types.description: A person operating a vehicle to carry out deliveries.

entity_types.name: Vehicle
entity_types.description: A transport asset (van, truck, bike) used for deliveries.

entity_types.name: DeliveryStop
entity_types.description: A single destination address on a route where goods are delivered.

entity_types.name: TrackingEvent
entity_types.description: A status update recording a parcel's location or state change.

entity_types.name: Sender
entity_types.description: The person or organisation dispatching the shipment.

entity_types.name: Recipient
entity_types.description: The person or organisation receiving the shipment.

entity_types.name: Depot
entity_types.description: A hub or sorting facility where shipments are consolidated or transferred.

relation_types.name: DISPATCHED_BY
relation_types.description: Shipment was dispatched by the target sender.

relation_types.name: DELIVERED_TO
relation_types.description: Shipment or parcel was delivered to the target recipient.

relation_types.name: ASSIGNED_TO
relation_types.description: Route is assigned to the target driver or vehicle.

relation_types.name: INCLUDES
relation_types.description: Shipment includes the target parcel.

relation_types.name: FOLLOWS
relation_types.description: Route follows the target sequence of delivery stops.

relation_types.name: TRACKED_BY
relation_types.description: Parcel state is captured in the target tracking event.

relation_types.name: PROCESSED_AT
relation_types.description: Shipment is processed at the target depot.

relation_types.name: STOPS_AT
relation_types.description: Route stops at the target delivery stop.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: A finished or semi-finished good produced in the facility.

entity_types.name: BOM
entity_types.description: A bill of materials listing components required to make a product.

entity_types.name: Component
entity_types.description: A raw material or sub-assembly used in production.

entity_types.name: Batch
entity_types.description: A discrete production run of a product with quantity and date.

entity_types.name: ProductionOrder
entity_types.description: An instruction to manufacture a specified quantity of a product.

entity_types.name: Operation
entity_types.description: A single step in the manufacturing process (cut, assemble, pack).

entity_types.name: Machine
entity_types.description: A piece of equipment used in production operations.

entity_types.name: QualityCheck
entity_types.description: An inspection result confirming batch or product conformance.

entity_types.name: Supplier
entity_types.description: A vendor providing raw materials or components.

relation_types.name: DEFINED_BY
relation_types.description: Product's composition is defined by the target BOM.

relation_types.name: REQUIRES
relation_types.description: BOM requires the target component.

relation_types.name: PRODUCED_IN
relation_types.description: Batch was produced in the target production order.

relation_types.name: EXECUTED_ON
relation_types.description: Operation was executed on the target machine.

relation_types.name: PART_OF
relation_types.description: Operation is part of the target production order.

relation_types.name: CHECKED_IN
relation_types.description: Batch passed or failed the target quality check.

relation_types.name: SUPPLIED_BY
relation_types.description: Component is supplied by the target supplier.

relation_types.name: YIELDS
relation_types.description: Production order yields the target batch or product.

entity_types.name: Donor
entity_types.description: A person or organisation that contributes funds or resources.

entity_types.name: Donation
entity_types.description: A financial or in-kind contribution made by a donor.

entity_types.name: Campaign
entity_types.description: A time-limited fundraising or awareness initiative.

entity_types.name: Grant
entity_types.description: Funding awarded by a foundation or government to the organisation.

entity_types.name: Volunteer
entity_types.description: A person giving their time and skills without pay.

entity_types.name: Event
entity_types.description: A fundraising, community, or awareness-raising activity.

entity_types.name: Beneficiary
entity_types.description: A person or community that receives services or support.

entity_types.name: Program
entity_types.description: A long-running initiative delivering services to beneficiaries.

entity_types.name: GrantReport
entity_types.description: A document reporting outcomes and spending to a grant-making body.

relation_types.name: DONATED_BY
relation_types.description: Donation was made by the target donor.

relation_types.name: RAISED_IN
relation_types.description: Donation or funds were raised in the target campaign or event.

relation_types.name: AWARDED_BY
relation_types.description: Grant was awarded by the target foundation or agency.

relation_types.name: SUPPORTS
relation_types.description: Campaign, grant, or program supports the target beneficiary or program.

relation_types.name: PARTICIPATES_IN
relation_types.description: Volunteer participates in the target event or program.

relation_types.name: SERVES
relation_types.description: Program serves the target beneficiary.

relation_types.name: REPORTED_IN
relation_types.description: Grant outcomes are reported in the target grant report.

relation_types.name: ORGANISED_BY
relation_types.description: Event is organised by a staff member, volunteer, or the organisation.

entity_types.name: Project
entity_types.description: A time-bounded initiative with a goal, owner, and deliverables.

entity_types.name: Task
entity_types.description: An atomic unit of work within a project or sprint.

entity_types.name: Milestone
entity_types.description: A significant checkpoint or deadline within a project.

entity_types.name: Sprint
entity_types.description: A fixed time-box in which a set of tasks is planned and executed.

entity_types.name: TeamMember
entity_types.description: A person assigned to one or more projects or tasks.

entity_types.name: Resource
entity_types.description: A person, tool, budget, or asset allocated to project work.

entity_types.name: Risk
entity_types.description: An identified uncertainty that could affect project delivery.

entity_types.name: Dependency
entity_types.description: A constraint that links two tasks or milestones in sequence.

entity_types.name: Deliverable
entity_types.description: A specific output or artifact produced by the project.

entity_types.name: StatusUpdate
entity_types.description: A periodic report on project or task progress.

relation_types.name: ASSIGNED_TO
relation_types.description: Task is assigned to the target team member.

relation_types.name: BELONGS_TO
relation_types.description: Task or milestone belongs to the target project or sprint.

relation_types.name: DEPENDS_ON
relation_types.description: Task cannot start until the target task or milestone is complete.

relation_types.name: BLOCKS
relation_types.description: Subject task blocks progress on the target task.

relation_types.name: OWNS
relation_types.description: Team member or role owns the target project or deliverable.

relation_types.name: USES
relation_types.description: Project or task uses the target resource.

relation_types.name: MITIGATES
relation_types.description: Action or plan mitigates the target risk.

relation_types.name: PRODUCES
relation_types.description: Project or task produces the target deliverable.

entity_types.name: Supplier
entity_types.description: An external party that provides goods or services.

entity_types.name: PurchaseOrder
entity_types.description: A formal request to a supplier to deliver goods at agreed terms.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: A physical or digital item that is stocked or procured.

entity_types.name: StockItem
entity_types.description: A specific SKU tracked in inventory with quantity on hand.

entity_types.name: Warehouse
entity_types.description: A physical location where inventory is stored.

entity_types.name: Delivery
entity_types.description: A shipment of goods received from a supplier or dispatched to a customer.

entity_types.name: Invoice
entity_types.description: A billing document issued by a supplier for goods delivered.

entity_types.name: PriceList
entity_types.description: A supplier's or internal catalogue of prices for products.

entity_types.name: Requisition
entity_types.description: An internal request to purchase goods or services.

entity_types.name: Contract
entity_types.description: A supply agreement defining terms, pricing, and volumes.

relation_types.name: SUPPLIED_BY
relation_types.description: Product or delivery is supplied by the target supplier.

relation_types.name: FULFILS
relation_types.description: Delivery fulfils the target purchase order or requisition.

relation_types.name: STORED_IN
relation_types.description: Stock item is stored in the target warehouse.

relation_types.name: COVERED_BY
relation_types.description: Purchase order is covered by the target contract.

relation_types.name: ISSUED_FOR
relation_types.description: Invoice is issued for the target purchase order or delivery.

relation_types.name: LISTED_IN
relation_types.description: Product is listed in the target price list.

relation_types.name: TRIGGERS
relation_types.description: Requisition triggers the target purchase order.

relation_types.name: REPLENISHES
relation_types.description: Delivery replenishes the target stock item.

entity_types.name: Client
entity_types.description: An organisation or individual purchasing professional services.

entity_types.name: Engagement
entity_types.description: A scoped project or retainer agreement with a client.

entity_types.name: Deliverable
entity_types.description: A specific output committed to a client: report, code, design.

entity_types.name: Consultant
entity_types.description: A professional assigned to deliver work on an engagement.

entity_types.name: TimeEntry
entity_types.description: A logged record of hours worked on an engagement or task.

entity_types.name: Invoice
entity_types.description: A billing document sent to a client for hours or milestones.

entity_types.name: Proposal
entity_types.description: A scoped offer describing work, timeline, and fees.

entity_types.name: Milestone
entity_types.description: A key checkpoint or billing trigger within an engagement.

entity_types.name: Feedback
entity_types.description: Client input on deliverable quality or team performance.

entity_types.name: Contract
entity_types.description: A signed agreement defining scope, fees, and terms.

relation_types.name: SERVES
relation_types.description: Engagement or consultant serves the target client.

relation_types.name: ASSIGNED_TO
relation_types.description: Consultant is assigned to the target engagement or task.

relation_types.name: PRODUCES
relation_types.description: Engagement or consultant produces the target deliverable.

relation_types.name: BILLED_FOR
relation_types.description: Invoice is billed for the target engagement or milestone.

relation_types.name: LOGGED_AGAINST
relation_types.description: Time entry is logged against the target engagement or task.

relation_types.name: GOVERNED_BY
relation_types.description: Engagement is governed by the target contract.

relation_types.name: LEADS_TO
relation_types.description: Proposal leads to the target engagement or contract.

relation_types.name: RECEIVED_BY
relation_types.description: Feedback was received from the target client.

entity_types.name: Property
entity_types.description: A real estate asset: apartment, house, office, or land plot.

entity_types.name: Owner
entity_types.description: The person or entity holding title to a property.

entity_types.name: Tenant
entity_types.description: A person or entity renting a property under a lease.

entity_types.name: LeaseAgreement
entity_types.description: A contract granting use of a property for a term and rent.

entity_types.name: Showing
entity_types.description: A scheduled viewing of a property by a prospective buyer or tenant.

entity_types.name: Offer
entity_types.description: A formal bid to purchase or lease a property at stated terms.

entity_types.name: Transaction
entity_types.description: A completed sale or lease execution for a property.

entity_types.name: Agent
entity_types.description: A real estate professional representing buyers, sellers, or landlords.

entity_types.name: Inspection
entity_types.description: A formal assessment of a property's condition.

entity_types.name: Listing
entity_types.description: A public advertisement of a property available for sale or rent.

relation_types.name: OWNED_BY
relation_types.description: Property is owned by the target owner.

relation_types.name: LEASED_BY
relation_types.description: Property is leased to the target tenant under a lease agreement.

relation_types.name: LISTED_BY
relation_types.description: Property is listed by the target agent.

relation_types.name: SHOWN_TO
relation_types.description: Showing is presented to the target prospect.

relation_types.name: COVERED_BY
relation_types.description: Transaction or lease is covered by the target agreement.

relation_types.name: INSPECTED_IN
relation_types.description: Property was assessed in the target inspection.

relation_types.name: RESULTED_IN
relation_types.description: Showing or offer resulted in the target transaction.

relation_types.name: ADVERTISED_AS
relation_types.description: Property is advertised as the target listing.

entity_types.name: Store
entity_types.description: A physical retail outlet with address, hours, and staff.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: A goods item sold in store, with SKU, price, and description.

entity_types.name: ProductCategory
entity_types.description: A hierarchical classification grouping related products.

entity_types.name: Sale
entity_types.description: A completed retail transaction with items, amount, and date.

entity_types.name: Receipt
entity_types.description: A document recording a specific sale transaction.

entity_types.name: Customer
entity_types.description: A person who makes purchases in the store.

entity_types.name: Return
entity_types.description: A customer-initiated reversal of a previous purchase.

entity_types.name: Promotion
entity_types.description: A time-limited discount or marketing offer applied to products.

entity_types.name: Supplier
entity_types.description: A vendor providing goods for resale in the store.

entity_types.name: StockLevel
entity_types.description: The current inventory quantity of a product at a store.

relation_types.name: SOLD_AT
relation_types.description: Product is sold at the target store.

relation_types.name: BELONGS_TO
relation_types.description: Product belongs to the target category.

relation_types.name: MADE_AT
relation_types.description: Sale was made at the target store.

relation_types.name: PURCHASED_BY
relation_types.description: Sale was made to the target customer.

relation_types.name: INCLUDES
relation_types.description: Sale or receipt includes the target product.

relation_types.name: APPLIES_TO
relation_types.description: Promotion applies to the target product or category.

relation_types.name: RESULTS_IN
relation_types.description: Return results from the target sale.

relation_types.name: SUPPLIED_BY
relation_types.description: Product is supplied by the target supplier.

entity_types.name: Lead
entity_types.description: A prospective customer at an early stage of the sales funnel.

entity_types.name: Contact
entity_types.description: A named individual at a prospective or existing client company.

entity_types.name: Account
entity_types.description: A customer or prospect company tracked in the CRM.

entity_types.name: Opportunity
entity_types.description: A qualified sales deal being actively pursued.

entity_types.name: Proposal
entity_types.description: A commercial offer or quotation sent to a prospect.

entity_types.name: Activity
entity_types.description: A logged sales action: call, email, meeting, or demo.

entity_types.name: Pipeline
entity_types.description: An ordered set of stages through which deals progress.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: A good or service being sold, with price and description.

entity_types.name: Contract
entity_types.description: A signed agreement formalising a sale or renewal.

entity_types.name: SalesRep
entity_types.description: A salesperson responsible for one or more accounts or deals.

relation_types.name: OWNED_BY
relation_types.description: Opportunity or account is assigned to the target sales rep.

relation_types.name: BELONGS_TO
relation_types.description: Lead or contact belongs to the target account.

relation_types.name: HAS_STAGE
relation_types.description: Opportunity is currently at the target pipeline stage.

relation_types.name: RESULTED_IN
relation_types.description: Lead or opportunity resulted in the target contract or deal.

relation_types.name: INCLUDES
relation_types.description: Proposal or contract includes the target product or line item.

relation_types.name: LOGGED_FOR
relation_types.description: Activity was logged against the target contact or opportunity.

relation_types.name: CONVERTS_TO
relation_types.description: Lead converts to the target contact or opportunity.

relation_types.name: FOLLOWS_UP_ON
relation_types.description: Activity is a follow-up to the target activity or opportunity.
